case_title: Large Load Service Rider — Data Center Tariff (Amazon/MSFT/Google intervenors)
ratepayer_impact: customer-specific equipment costs direct-assigned; generation costs socialized
notes: Intervenors: Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Data Center Coalition. Sets 70/150 MW tiers; $0.034/kW min demand charge; collateral requirement; ~$1B stranded cost exposure per 1GW customer 5+ yr early exit.

case_title: Large Load Service Rider — Data Center Tariff (Amazon/MSFT/Google intervenors)
ratepayer_impact: customer-specific equipment costs direct-assigned; generation costs socialized
notes: Tier 2: 150 MW+ customers. Both tiers: minimum demand charge $0.034/kW/month. Load growth trigger: 2800 MW → 7000 MW by 2030.

case_title: Large Load Service Rider — Data Center Tariff (Amazon/MSFT/Google intervenors)
ratepayer_impact: generation capacity costs socialized across all ratepayers
notes: I&M baseline peak load 2800 MW → 7000 MW by 2030. Amazon commitment cited: $11B. Microsoft cited: $3.3B. Cost allocation: customer-specific equipment → data center; generation capacity → all ratepayers.

case_title: I&M Transmission Service Rider (related large-load infrastructure)
ratepayer_impact: transmission upgrade costs may be socialized
notes: Related to 46097; governs transmission service for large load customers.

case_title: Certificate — Oregon Clean Energy Center Acquisition (870 MW NGCC)
ratepayer_impact: 870 MW NGCC enters I&M rate base; all costs recovered from all ratepayers
notes: Oregon Clean Energy Center: 870 MW NGCC, operational 2017, 32-year remaining life (~2057 EOL). IURC approved acquisition into I&M rate base. Cited driver: 2800→7000 MW data center load growth. All costs: general rate base.

case_title: EGR Plan — 1650 MW gas CT + 1500 MW clean energy (Expedited Generation Resource)
ratepayer_impact: new generation enters rate base; all ratepayers pay for capacity driven by hyperscale load
notes: Indiana Code EGR framework. 6900 MW total ICAP need 2025-2030. 4034 MW capacity deficit without plan. Approved: 1650 MW gas CTs + up to 1500 MW clean energy. 3400 MW signed large load commitments. Cost allocation: all ratepayers.

case_title: EGR Plan — 1650 MW gas CT + 1500 MW clean energy (Expedited Generation Resource)
ratepayer_impact: new gas CT capacity enters I&M rate base
notes: 1650 MW new gas combustion turbines approved. Rationale: dispatchable capacity for data center load reliability. Asset life 25-30 years. Socialized to all ratepayers.

case_title: EGR Plan — 1650 MW gas CT + 1500 MW clean energy (Expedited Generation Resource)
ratepayer_impact: clean energy option pending procurement process
notes: Up to 1500 MW clean energy approved as part of EGR Plan. Procurement process to follow order.

ratepayer_impact: pending; if approved customer-specific costs direct-assigned to requesting customer
notes: Pending ARP for customer-specific clean capacity. Filed 2025-07-30. CAC intervening. Outcome determines direct-assignment vs. socialization of clean capacity for individual large load customers.

case_title: ARP — Second Customer-Specific Clean Capacity Arrangement (municipal intervenors)
ratepayer_impact: pending; municipal intervenors signal ratepayer cost-shift concern
notes: Pending ARP. Intervenors: Marion, Fort Wayne, South Bend, CAC. Municipal involvement signals concern about cost shifting to local ratepayers. Filed 2025-10-03.
